mapper.delete: UPDATE refresh_token SET deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE refresh_token SET deleted = 1 WHERE expires_at < #{now} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET used = 1 WHERE token = #{token} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM refresh_token WHERE token = #{token} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM refresh_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
